Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates the presence of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia" as one of the diagnoses. This diagnosis directly relates to disorders of lipid metabolism, which includes conditions such as hyperlipidemia. Given that this diagnosis is explicitly mentioned, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit, as there is clear evidence of an ongoing lipid disorder that is likely to be managed or monitored in future visits.
